info.name: compareExpressions API Tests
info.description:
Test suite for the compareExpressions Lambda function covering legacy eval/preview and muEd API paths.

## Setup
Set `baseUrl` to:
- **Local (Lambda RIE):** `http://localhost:9000/2015-03-31/functions/function/invocations`
- **Staging/Prod (API Gateway):** your deployed API Gateway URL

## Helper architecture
The collection pre-request stores shared builder functions in `pm.globals.__helpers`. Each request pre-request calls `eval(pm.globals.get('__helpers'))` and then uses `buildLegacyEvalEvent`, `buildLegacyPreviewEvent`, or `buildMuEdEvent`. Three shared test cases (`tc_simple_correct`, `tc_simple_incorrect`, `tc_algebraic_equiv`) are stored as collection variables and referenced by both Folder 0 (muEd) and Folder 1 (legacy).

variable.description: Change to your API Gateway URL for staging/prod testing

item.name: Incorrect: algebraically equal but different form

exec: pm.test('tag response written as answer_FALSE present', function () { pm.expect(r.result.tags).to.include('response written as answer_FALSE'); });

item.name: Correct: set notation equivalent to plus_minus

exec: var params = {strict_syntax:false, elementary_functions:true, symbols:{plus_minus:{latex:'\\(\\pm\\)', aliases:['pm','+-']}, minus_plus:{latex:'\\(\\mp\\)', aliases:['mp','-+']}}};
pm.variables.set('lambdaEvent', JSON.stringify(buildLegacyEvalEvent('pm x**2 + mp y**2', 'plus_minus x**2 + minus_plus y**2', params)));

item.name: Correct: set notation equivalent to plus_minus

exec: pm.test('response is an array', function () { pm.expect(r).to.be.an('array'); });
var params = {strict_syntax:false, elementary_functions:true, symbols:{plus_minus:{latex:'\\(\\pm\\)', aliases:['pm','+-']}, minus_plus:{latex:'\\(\\mp\\)', aliases:['mp','-+']}}};
pm.variables.set('lambdaEvent', JSON.stringify(buildMuEdEvent('pm x**2 + mp y**2', 'plus_minus x**2 + minus_plus y**2', params)));
